name: chift
description: Reads Chift consumers, connections, and syncs through the Chift REST API using a session-token (client credentials) exchange.

risk.read: external Chift API read of consumer/connection/sync integration metadata

conformance.reason: sole auth candidate is mode:custom (hook: chift, no when-gated non-custom fallback); the AuthHook's token exchange POSTs to {{ config.base_url }}/token, but conformance's dynamic replay only overrides engine.Bundle.HTTP.URL (the stream/check request base), never cfg.Config["base_url"] itself (which stays the synthetic non-URL placeholder value) — the hook has no reachable replay target, matching gmail's identical documented shape. Hook-covered; proven by internal/connectors/hooks/chift/hooks_test.go (TestAuthenticator_MintsSessionTokenAndSetsBearer asserts the JSON POST body shape and resulting Bearer header end-to-end against a real httptest.Server).
